subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, O my Lord! Thou seest me trembling in my every limb, my pillars shaken, my members quaking, in my grief from tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی ترانی مرتجف الاعضاء مترعرع الارکان متزعزع الاجزاء لحزنی من المصائب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @presence of; reunion with God, @love of God
